raw_title: Sabine Mauderer: Preserving stability in a fragmented and uncertain world
raw_content: Speech by Dr Sabine Mauderer, First Deputy Governor of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the 3rd International Conference on the Climate-Macro-Finance Interface "Emerging macroeconomic, financial, and environmental policy challenges in an era of polycrisis and rising uncertainties," Frankfurt am Main, 23 March 2026.
